name: hcls-agents
description: Healthcare and Life Sciences domain skills and MCP tools for building agents on AWS

interface.shortDescription: Domain skills and MCP tools for healthcare and life sciences AI agents
interface.longDescription: Build healthcare and life sciences AI agents on AWS with domain-specific skills (genomics, drug discovery, clinical trials, biomarker analysis) and MCP tools (30+ biomedical databases, ontology lookup, literature search). Use alongside the AWS Agent Toolkit for infrastructure deployment.
